archetype.name: Organic & Earthy
archetype.vibe: Editorial, hopeful, trustworthy, grounded. Escaping the generic 'Bootstrap charity' feel by using magazine-like typography, warm textural colors, and intimate photography.

hierarchy_rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-charcoal
hierarchy_rules.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight text-charcoal

header.utility_bar: bg-[#114D32] text-white text-xs py-2 text-center uppercase tracking-wider

cards.causes: bg-white border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300
cards.volunteers: bg-[#F2EFE9] border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-3xl p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center

buttons.primary: bg-[#26C281] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#1B9B6A] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1B9B6A] text-[#1B9B6A] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#1B9B6A] hover:text-white transition-colors
buttons.white: bg-white text-[#114D32] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#F2EFE9] transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#1A211D]/20 rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:border-[#26C281] focus:ring-0 transition-colors w-full placeholder-[#1A211D]/40 text-[#1A211D]

motion_guidelines.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for premium feel.
motion_guidelines.reveal: Framer Motion: initial opacity-0 y-12, whileInView opacity-1 y-0, duration 0.6s, ease-out.
motion_guidelines.stagger: Grid children should stagger by 0.1s on entrance.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.layout: 50/50 split or overlapping text on image. H1: 'Nurturing Young Minds, Building Bright Futures'. Tagline: BACHPANSALA project. Dual CTAs.

sections_blueprint.name: Impact Stats
sections_blueprint.layout: Dark background (#0F1F17). 4 columns grid. Large numbers (68, 28, 6, 42000) using animated counter. Labels: Volunteers, States, Causes, Beneficiaries.

sections_blueprint.name: About / Mission
sections_blueprint.layout: Asymmetric text layout with rich typography. Large drop cap or highlighted text.

sections_blueprint.name: Causes / Campaigns
sections_blueprint.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A). 6 items: Education, Healthcare, Women Empowerment, Environment, Rural Development, Skill Training.

sections_blueprint.name: Events
sections_blueprint.layout: Card showing 'International Day of Happiness 2025' with date and green 'Read More' CTA.

sections_blueprint.name: Our Volunteers
sections_blueprint.layout: 4-column grid. Portrait photos. Feature 'Faiz Khan - Volunteer Supervisor'.

sections_blueprint.name: Donate / Volunteer (Forms)
sections_blueprint.layout: Side-by-side or stacked on a warm background block. Donate: Fixed amounts buttons + custom input. Volunteer: Clean minimal line-inputs.

sections_blueprint.name: Footer
sections_blueprint.layout: Dark or very dark green background. Massive 'InAmigos' typography.

anti_patterns: Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF. Use the defined palette.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Cormorant Garamond is mandatory.
Do NOT center align heavy text blocks. Left align for readability.
Do NOT use heavy drop shadows on cards. Rely on 1px borders and background contrast.
Do NOT use emojis anywhere in the UI.
